{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = essence (Cradle)
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Armor can burst into essence.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14">''Waybound'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
